Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import pandas as pd
import os

base_dir = "/Users/arundurai/Public/Prasanna Works/medagg/backend/activite_csv"

files = {
    "NotesExport.xlsx": os.path.join\(base_dir, "NotesExport.xlsx"\),
    "callexport \(2\).xlsx": os.path.join\(base_dir, "callexport \(2\).xlsx"\),
    "systemNotesExport.xlsx": os.path.join\(base_dir, "systemNotesExport.xlsx"\),
    "whatsappExport.xlsx": os.path.join\(base_dir, "whatsappExport.xlsx"\),
}

for label, fpath in files.items\(\):
    print\("=" * 80\)
    print\(f"FILE: {label}"\)
    print\("=" * 80\)
    try:
        df = pd.read_excel\(fpath, dtype=str\)
        print\(f"\\nTotal Rows: {len\(df\)}"\)
        print\(f"Total Columns: {len\(df.columns\)}"\)
        print\(f"\\nColumn Headers \({len\(df.columns\)}\):"\)
        for i, col in enumerate\(df.columns, 1\):
            print\(f"  {i:2d}. {col}"\)
        print\(f"\\nSample Data \(first 5 rows\):"\)
        print\(df.head\(5\).to_string\(index=False\)\)
        print\(\)

        # Interesting patterns
        print\("Interesting Patterns:"\)
        for col in df.columns:
            unique_count = df[col].nunique\(\)
            null_count = df[col].isna\(\).sum\(\)
            if null_count > 0:
                print\(f"  - '{col}': {null_count} null values \({round\(null_count/len\(df\)*100, 1\)}% empty\)"\)
            if unique_count < 15 and unique_count > 0:
                vals = df[col].dropna\(\).unique\(\).tolist\(\)
                print\(f"  - '{col}': only {unique_count} unique values → {vals}"\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f"  ERROR reading file: {e}"\)
    print\(\)

EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
path = '/Users/arundurai/Public/Prasanna Works/medagg/backend/controllers/callerController.js'
with open\(path, 'r'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Replace \\$gte with $gte and \\$lte with $lte only where rangeStart/rangeEnd are involved
fixed = content.replace\('\\\\$gte: rangeStart, \\\\$lte: rangeEnd', '$gte: rangeStart, $lte: rangeEnd'\)

with open\(path, 'w'\) as f:
    f.write\(fixed\)

print\("Done, remaining backslash-dollar:", fixed.count\('\\\\$gte: rangeStart'\)\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import re

path = '/Users/arundurai/Public/Prasanna Works/medagg/frontend/src/pages/caller/dashboard/page.jsx'
with open\(path, 'r'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Replace all toLeads calls - remove date=today& or date=today prefix
replacements = [
    \('toLeads\("date=today&status=New Lead"\)', 'toLeads\("status=New Lead"\)'\),
    \('toLeads\("date=today&status=opd%20booked"\)', 'toLeads\("status=opd%20booked"\)'\),
    \('toLeads\("date=today&status=opd%20done"\)', 'toLeads\("status=opd%20done"\)'\),
    \('toLeads\("date=today&status=ipd%20booked"\)', 'toLeads\("status=ipd%20booked"\)'\),
    \('toLeads\("date=today&status=ipd%20done"\)', 'toLeads\("status=ipd%20done"\)'\),
    \('toLeads\("date=today&status=diagnostic%20booked"\)', 'toLeads\("status=diagnostic%20booked"\)'\),
    \('toLeads\("date=today&status=diagnostic%20done"\)', 'toLeads\("status=diagnostic%20done"\)'\),
    \('toLeads\("date=today&callStatus=connected"\)', 'toLeads\("callStatus=connected"\)'\),
    \('toLeads\("date=today&opd=Booked"\)', 'toLeads\("opd=Booked"\)'\),
    \('toLeads\("date=today&opd=Done"\)', 'toLeads\("opd=Done"\)'\),
    \('toLeads\("date=today&ipd=Booked"\)', 'toLeads\("ipd=Booked"\)'\),
    \('toLeads\("date=today&ipd=Done"\)', 'toLeads\("ipd=Done"\)'\),
    \('toLeads\("date=today&diag=Booked"\)', 'toLeads\("diag=Booked"\)'\),
    \('toLeads\("date=today&diag=Done"\)', 'toLeads\("diag=Done"\)'\),
    \('toLeads\("date=today"\)', 'toLeads\(\)'\),
    # Task cards: fixed followup filter, independent of date range
    \('toLeads\("date=tasks_today&view=tasks_today"\)', '"/leads?followup=Today"'\),
]

for old, new in replacements:
    count = content.count\(old\)
    content = content.replace\(old, new\)
    print\(f"  {old[:50]} → replaced {count}x"\)

with open\(path, 'w'\) as f:
    f.write\(content\)
print\("Done"\)
EOF)
